TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kaphay a kamuŤ¨õÁöĄŚ§™ś£íšļÜ i nanisulitn mitesek anu silawad kapinapins smiadp Ina nisulita acuda apuyu', kaphay a kamu palada kaku titaan. mikuku' kuayam. tkelaw tuťõěŚŹęšļÜŚ§©śúÉšļģ, anu caay pikuku' ku ayam .a takelatu. ťõěšłćŚŹęŚ§©šĻüśúÉšļģ, u takelal nu dedemiad hidan caykasa ku ayam , widasa cima kids manengilay. . mapacekilay malakuwit tu kucacay a demiad, u cay kapacekil malakuwit tu cacay a demiad. . Idaw kida tademaw micakay tu cacay a haku tu li, caledes ku demiad matalaw a mamuni' ki li, tudedemiad pili' han nida ku laecusay a mukan, sadikuday sa cacay a haku mamuni' namin. hamin nu kamu, misulit tu sasualaÁłĹÁĶźšłÄšłč,šĹúŚĻÖŚįćŤĀĮ: pabaw; padeng hank u kapahay mukan sa mamuni'ayšłäŤĀĮ:śĒĺŤĎóŚ•ĹÁöĄŚźÉÁąõÁöĄ nusasa; mukan tu mamuni'ay kapah ku mamuni'ay.šłčŤĀĮ:ŚźÉšļÜÁąõÁöĄÁąõŚ•ĹÁöĄ mabalatay; mahidatu u mamuni'ay ku kanengś©ęśČĻ:śįłťĀ†ŚźÉÁąõÁöĄ śĄüśāü:minanam tu sikad anu hida mukan tu li kuni kaudip, palatikih tu cayay kalihalayay a kawaw, nikaudipan lihalaw tu, anu bakahan ku kasinpayan a kakwa , tu dedemiad likaten, anu mahida sa lapahak tu kisu! Kasaetim tuayda, baluduhen ku lipahak.ÁŹćśÉúÁē∂šłč,Á©ćś•ĶŚŅęś®ā! Inayay ku lecuh han matineng tu tu paayaw tu waywy. . Tatengaay u sipunu'ay , u mahicahica misinanut tu, amana pakay balucu'en ku laecusay a wayway! Pingan haw ! Paanini ku katinengan nisu a cabay atu masakaputay, payawan maala kisu nina libung haw ! u kapahay kisu a tademaw painian tu nu paudipay winisa palumaay tu kapah nu udip. u sasaydan atu ising nu kanpuyaku muculcul anu imelang haw hini ku nipikan sa. Katuuday a cabay anu maala nina lubung sa, napaiyu malakapahay tu, nika idaw ku mukilulay a imelang cay kakasenun sa kapah, pasu; ,ŚĆÖśč¨:musakamu mu uhuh, 1,Ť™™Ť©ĪŚí≥ŚóĹSiteluhu' ku takulaw2,ŚíĹŚĖČŚć°Áóįbaluwan utiih muhanhan 3,ŤÉłśā∂śėďŚĖė cay kakapah ku hanhan 4,ŚĎľŚźłšłćśöĘmalebaway ku cihek 5,ťľĽŚíĹŤÖęŤĄĻutiih ku udiudipan6,Á≤ĺÁ•ěšłćśŅü caykaasu' ku nikan 7,ť£üśÖĺšłćśĆĮ mabesu ku bili' 8,ŤĄĻśį£šłćś∂ą mapiyas adada ku bili' 9,ŤÖĻÁÄČŤÖĻÁóõakenek angtul ku laway 10,ŚŹ£Ťč¶ŚŹ£Ťá≠ maacak ku sema, caykaydih minanum11,ŚŹ£šĻĺŤąĆÁá•,ť£≤šłćŤß£śłī mahivay kiya mahaymaw ku patubeli 12,śÄĚśÖģšłćśłÖ,ŚŹćśáČŚĽ∂Śģē masinawal baeket kutangah 13,ť†≠Áóõť†≠śöą,ť†≠ťáćť†≠ŤĄĻ ubihid mahicay kiya kupatubeli 14,šļĒŚģėśłĺś≤Ć,śĄüÁü•ťÄÄŚĆĖ ubanges sitibeni' calenget 15,ÁöģŤÜöťē∑ÁĖĻ,ÁôľÁôĘÁÖ©ŤļĀ Sakamusa ku kanpuyaku tusa kunipatahekal nida tu kakanen, miedap imahini. :Palasit tu kakanen kakulut nu kabi ŚąÜšļę1,Ťč¶ÁďúśĻĮ"uzayliw" kakulut, imsi, tayu', cikah :Ťč¶Áďú,ŤĪÜŤĪČ,ŤĖĎÁČá,ťĻĹŚ∑ī hican usapisalami', alaen ku paenu' nu kakulut, banawen saatiladen mucikcik, amana pikabadas, kasenuhan tut ayu mutengel sepat bataan a sasulitan maminsa, pacumude tu imsi satanengah, pakulkulen aca tu lima a sasulitan, tuwa pacikah han kapah tu. : .Kabi nu tangkuy 2,ŚÜ¨ÁďúśĻĮ"zayliw"; tangkuy, tayu nidusdusan, tungkuy cacay, cikah, adahay, : hican sapisalami' amana lipaenui ku tangkuy, duhepicen mu cikcik, tayu nidusdusan, palecaden ku nanum mutengel tulu bataab a sasulitan u tungkuy "tusa a paysu'" tengelen aca tu lima a sasulitan pacikah paaledah tu adidi'. : . Ina tusaay a kabi', miadih tu nikaidaw nu puu', asuakanen, hinaala madayum musalami, caykatekes ucay kaw mahicahicaay a l'mi', nika idaw ku kapah amana ka sidumasa ukapahay a lami'.
S.PHON: kapńßaj a kamu***** i nanisur~…ĺitn mit…ôs…ôk anu sir~…ĺawad kapinapins smiadp ina nisur~…ĺita a ¶uda apuju Ē~ °, kapńßaj a kamu par~…ĺada kaku titaan. mikuku Ē~ ° kuajam. tk…ôr~…ĺaw tu******, anu ¶aaj pikuku Ē~ ° ku ajam .a tak…ôr~…ĺatu. *******, u tak…ôr~…ĺar~…ĺ nu d…ôd…ômiad ńßidan ¶ajkasa ku ajam , widasa ¶ima kids man…ôŇčir~…ĺaj. . mapa ¶…ôkir~…ĺaj mar~…ĺakuwit tu ku ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad, u ¶aj kapa ¶…ôkir~…ĺ mar~…ĺakuwit tu ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad. . idaw kida tad…ômaw mi ¶akaj tu ¶a ¶aj a ńßaku tu r~…ĺi, ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs ku d…ômiad matar~…ĺaw a mamuni Ē~ ° ki r~…ĺi, tud…ôd…ômiad pir~…ĺi Ē~ ° ńßan nida ku r~…ĺa…ô ¶usaj a mukan, sadikudaj sa ¶a ¶aj a ńßaku mamuni Ē~ ° namin. ńßamin nu kamu, misur~…ĺit tu sasuar~…ĺa****,****: pabaw; pad…ôŇč ńßank u kapańßaj mukan sa mamuni Ē~ °aj**:******* nusasa; mukan tu mamuni Ē~ °aj kapańß ku mamuni Ē~ °aj.**:******* mabar~…ĺataj; mańßidatu u mamuni Ē~ °aj ku kan…ôŇč**:***** **:minanam tu sikad anu ńßida mukan tu r~…ĺi kuni kaudip, par~…ĺatikińß tu ¶ajaj kar~…ĺińßar~…ĺajaj a kawaw, nikaudipan r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaw tu, anu bakańßan ku kasinpajan a kakwa , tu d…ôd…ômiad r~…ĺikat…ôn, anu mańßida sa r~…ĺapańßak tu kisu! kasa…ôtim tuajda, bar~…ĺuduńß…ôn ku r~…ĺipańßak.****,****! inajaj ku r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß ńßan matin…ôŇč tu tu paajaw tu wajwj. . tat…ôŇčaaj u sipunu Ē~ °aj , u mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a misinanut tu, amana pakaj bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °…ôn ku r~…ĺa…ô ¶usaj a wajwaj! piŇčan ńßaw ! paanini ku katin…ôŇčan nisu a ¶abaj atu masakaputaj, pajawan maar~…ĺa kisu nina r~…ĺibuŇč ńßaw ! u kapańßaj kisu a tad…ômaw painian tu nu paudipaj winisa par~…ĺumaaj tu kapańß nu udip. u sasajdan atu isiŇč nu kanpujaku mu ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ anu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßaw ńßini ku nipikan sa. katuudaj a ¶abaj anu maar~…ĺa nina r~…ĺubuŇč sa, napaiju mar~…ĺakapańßaj tu, nika idaw ku mukir~…ĺur~…ĺaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶aj kakas…ônun sa kapańß, pasu; ,**:musakamu mu uńßuńß, *,****sit…ôr~…ĺuńßu Ē~ ° ku takur~…ĺaw*,****bar~…ĺuwan utiińß muńßanńßan *,**** ¶aj kakapańß ku ńßanńßan *,****mar~…ĺ…ôbawaj ku ¶ińß…ôk *,****utiińß ku udiudipan*,**** ¶ajkaasu Ē~ ° ku nikan *,**** mab…ôsu ku bir~…ĺi Ē~ ° *,**** mapijas adada ku bir~…ĺi Ē~ ° *,****ak…ôn…ôk aŇčtur~…ĺ ku r~…ĺawaj **,**** maa ¶ak ku s…ôma, ¶ajkajdińß minanum**,****,**** mańßi*aj kija mańßajmaw ku patub…ôr~…ĺi **,****,**** masinawar~…ĺ ba…ôk…ôt kutaŇčańß **,****,**** ubińßid mańßi ¶aj kija kupatub…ôr~…ĺi **,****,**** ubaŇč…ôs sitib…ôni Ē~ ° ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôt **,****,**** sakamusa ku kanpujaku tusa kunipatańß…ôkar~…ĺ nida tu kakan…ôn, mi…ôdap imańßini. :par~…ĺasit tu kakan…ôn kakur~…ĺut nu kabi ***,***"uzajr~…ĺiw" kakur~…ĺut, imsi, taju Ē~ °, ¶ikańß :**,**,**,** ńßi ¶an usapisar~…ĺami Ē~ °, ar~…ĺa…ôn ku pa…ônu Ē~ ° nu kakur~…ĺut, banaw…ôn saatir~…ĺad…ôn mu ¶ik ¶ik, amana pikabadas, kas…ônuńßan tut aju mut…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺ s…ôpat bataan a sasur~…ĺitan maminsa, pa ¶umud…ô tu imsi satan…ôŇčańß, pakur~…ĺkur~…ĺ…ôn a ¶a tu r~…ĺima a sasur~…ĺitan, tuwa pa ¶ikańß ńßan kapańß tu. : .kabi nu taŇčkuj *,***"zajr~…ĺiw"; taŇčkuj, taju nidusdusan, tuŇčkuj ¶a ¶aj, ¶ikańß, adańßaj, : ńßi ¶an sapisar~…ĺami Ē~ ° amana r~…ĺipa…ônui ku taŇčkuj, duńß…ôpi ¶…ôn mu ¶ik ¶ik, taju nidusdusan, par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad…ôn ku nanum mut…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺ tur~…ĺu bataab a sasur~…ĺitan u tuŇčkuj "tusa a pajsu Ē~ °" t…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺ…ôn a ¶a tu r~…ĺima a sasur~…ĺitan pa ¶ikańß paar~…ĺ…ôdańß tu adidi Ē~ °. : . ina tusaaj a kabi Ē~ °, miadińß tu nikaidaw nu puu Ē~ °, asuakan…ôn, ńßinaar~…ĺa madajum musar~…ĺami, ¶ajkat…ôk…ôs u ¶aj kaw mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj a r~…ĺ Ē~ °mi Ē~ °, nika idaw ku kapańß amana ka sidumasa ukapańßaj a r~…ĺami Ē~ °.
S.FORM: kaphay a kamuŤ¨õÁöĄŚ§™ś£íšļÜ i nanisulitn mitesek anu silawad kapinapins smiadp Ina nisulita acuda apuyu', kaphay a kamu palada kaku titaan. mikuku' kuayam. tkelaw tuťõěŚŹęšļÜŚ§©śúÉšļģ, anu caay pikuku' ku ayam .a takelatu. ťõěšłćŚŹęŚ§©šĻüśúÉšļģ, u takelal nu dedemiad hidan caykasa ku ayam , widasa cima kids manengilay. . mapacekilay malakuwit tu kucacay a demiad, u cay kapacekil malakuwit tu cacay a demiad. . Idaw kida tademaw micakay tu cacay a haku tu li, caledes ku demiad matalaw a mamuni' ki li, tudedemiad pili' han nida ku laecusay a mukan, sadikuday sa cacay a haku mamuni' namin. hamin nu kamu, misulit tu sasualaÁłĹÁĶźšłÄšłč,šĹúŚĻÖŚįćŤĀĮ: pabaw; padeng hank u kapahay mukan sa mamuni'ayšłäŤĀĮ:śĒĺŤĎóŚ•ĹÁöĄŚźÉÁąõÁöĄ nusasa; mukan tu mamuni'ay kapah ku mamuni'ay.šłčŤĀĮ:ŚźÉšļÜÁąõÁöĄÁąõŚ•ĹÁöĄ mabalatay; mahidatu u mamuni'ay ku kanengś©ęśČĻ:śįłťĀ†ŚźÉÁąõÁöĄ śĄüśāü:minanam tu sikad anu hida mukan tu li kuni kaudip, palatikih tu cayay kalihalayay a kawaw, nikaudipan lihalaw tu, anu bakahan ku kasinpayan a kakwa , tu dedemiad likaten, anu mahida sa lapahak tu kisu! Kasaetim tuayda, baluduhen ku lipahak.ÁŹćśÉúÁē∂šłč,Á©ćś•ĶŚŅęś®ā! Inayay ku lecuh han matineng tu tu paayaw tu waywy. . Tatengaay u sipunu'ay , u mahicahica misinanut tu, amana pakay balucu'en ku laecusay a wayway! Pingan haw ! Paanini ku katinengan nisu a cabay atu masakaputay, payawan maala kisu nina libung haw ! u kapahay kisu a tademaw painian tu nu paudipay winisa palumaay tu kapah nu udip. u sasaydan atu ising nu kanpuyaku muculcul anu imelang haw hini ku nipikan sa. Katuuday a cabay anu maala nina lubung sa, napaiyu malakapahay tu, nika idaw ku mukilulay a imelang cay kakasenun sa kapah, pasu; ,ŚĆÖśč¨:musakamu mu uhuh, 1,Ť™™Ť©ĪŚí≥ŚóĹSiteluhu' ku takulaw2,ŚíĹŚĖČŚć°Áóįbaluwan utiih muhanhan 3,ŤÉłśā∂śėďŚĖė cay kakapah ku hanhan 4,ŚĎľŚźłšłćśöĘmalebaway ku cihek 5,ťľĽŚíĹŤÖęŤĄĻutiih ku udiudipan6,Á≤ĺÁ•ěšłćśŅü caykaasu' ku nikan 7,ť£üśÖĺšłćśĆĮ mabesu ku bili' 8,ŤĄĻśį£šłćś∂ą mapiyas adada ku bili' 9,ŤÖĻÁÄČŤÖĻÁóõakenek angtul ku laway 10,ŚŹ£Ťč¶ŚŹ£Ťá≠ maacak ku sema, caykaydih minanum11,ŚŹ£šĻĺŤąĆÁá•,ť£≤šłćŤß£śłī mahivay kiya mahaymaw ku patubeli 12,śÄĚśÖģšłćśłÖ,ŚŹćśáČŚĽ∂Śģē masinawal baeket kutangah 13,ť†≠Áóõť†≠śöą,ť†≠ťáćť†≠ŤĄĻ ubihid mahicay kiya kupatubeli 14,šļĒŚģėśłĺś≤Ć,śĄüÁü•ťÄÄŚĆĖ ubanges sitibeni' calenget 15,ÁöģŤÜöťē∑ÁĖĻ,ÁôľÁôĘÁÖ©ŤļĀ Sakamusa ku kanpuyaku tusa kunipatahekal nida tu kakanen, miedap imahini. :Palasit tu kakanen kakulut nu kabi ŚąÜšļę1,Ťč¶ÁďúśĻĮ"uzayliw" kakulut, imsi, tayu', cikah :Ťč¶Áďú,ŤĪÜŤĪČ,ŤĖĎÁČá,ťĻĹŚ∑ī hican usapisalami', alaen ku paenu' nu kakulut, banawen saatiladen mucikcik, amana pikabadas, kasenuhan tut ayu mutengel sepat bataan a sasulitan maminsa, pacumude tu imsi satanengah, pakulkulen aca tu lima a sasulitan, tuwa pacikah han kapah tu. : .Kabi nu tangkuy 2,ŚÜ¨ÁďúśĻĮ"zayliw"; tangkuy, tayu nidusdusan, tungkuy cacay, cikah, adahay, : hican sapisalami' amana lipaenui ku tangkuy, duhepicen mu cikcik, tayu nidusdusan, palecaden ku nanum mutengel tulu bataab a sasulitan u tungkuy "tusa a paysu'" tengelen aca tu lima a sasulitan pacikah paaledah tu adidi'. : . Ina tusaay a kabi', miadih tu nikaidaw nu puu', asuakanen, hinaala madayum musalami, caykatekes ucay kaw mahicahicaay a l'mi', nika idaw ku kapah amana ka sidumasa ukapahay a lami'.

pad…ôŇč ńßank u kapańßaj mukan sa mamuni Ē~ °aj**:******* nusasa; mukan tu mamuni Ē~ °aj kapańß ku mamuni Ē~ °aj.**:******* mabar~…ĺataj; mańßidatu u mamuni Ē~ °aj ku kan…ôŇč**:***** **:minanam tu sikad anu ńßida mukan tu r~…ĺi kuni kaudip, par~…ĺatikińß tu ¶ajaj kar~…ĺińßar~…ĺajaj a kawaw, nikaudipan r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaw tu, anu bakańßan ku kasinpajan a kakwa , tu d…ôd…ômiad r~…ĺikat…ôn, anu mańßida sa r~…ĺapańßak tu kisu! kasa…ôtim tuajda, bar~…ĺuduńß…ôn ku r~…ĺipańßak.****,****! inajaj ku r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß ńßan matin…ôŇč tu tu paajaw tu wajwj. . tat…ôŇčaaj u sipunu Ē~ °aj , u mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a misinanut tu, amana pakaj bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °…ôn ku r~…ĺa…ô ¶usaj a wajwaj! piŇčan ńßaw ! paanini ku katin…ôŇčan nisu a ¶abaj atu masakaputaj, pajawan maar~…ĺa kisu nina r~…ĺibuŇč ńßaw ! u kapańßaj kisu a tad…ômaw painian tu nu paudipaj winisa par~…ĺumaaj tu kapańß nu udip. u sasajdan atu isiŇč nu kanpujaku mu ¶ur~…ĺ ¶ur~…ĺ anu im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ńßaw ńßini ku nipikan sa. katuudaj a ¶abaj anu maar~…ĺa nina r~…ĺubuŇč sa, napaiju mar~…ĺakapańßaj tu, nika idaw ku mukir~…ĺur~…ĺaj a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč ¶aj kakas…ônun sa kapańß, pasu; ,**:musakamu mu uńßuńß, *,****sit…ôr~…ĺuńßu Ē~ ° ku takur~…ĺaw*,****bar~…ĺuwan utiińß muńßanńßan *,**** ¶aj kakapańß ku ńßanńßan *,****mar~…ĺ…ôbawaj ku ¶ińß…ôk *,****utiińß ku udiudipan*,**** ¶ajkaasu Ē~ ° ku nikan *,**** mab…ôsu ku bir~…ĺi Ē~ ° *,**** mapijas adada ku bir~…ĺi Ē~ ° *,****ak…ôn…ôk aŇčtur~…ĺ ku r~…ĺawaj **,**** maa ¶ak ku s…ôma, ¶ajkajdińß minanum**,****,**** mańßi*aj kija mańßajmaw ku patub…ôr~…ĺi **,****,**** masinawar~…ĺ ba…ôk…ôt kutaŇčańß **,****,**** ubińßid mańßi ¶aj kija kupatub…ôr~…ĺi **,****,**** ubaŇč…ôs sitib…ôni Ē~ ° ¶ar~…ĺ…ôŇč…ôt **,****,**** sakamusa ku kanpujaku tusa kunipatańß…ôkar~…ĺ nida tu kakan…ôn, mi…ôdap imańßini. :par~…ĺasit tu kakan…ôn kakur~…ĺut nu kabi ***,***"uzajr~…ĺiw" kakur~…ĺut, imsi, taju Ē~ °, ¶ikańß :**,**,**,** ńßi ¶an usapisar~…ĺami Ē~ °, ar~…ĺa…ôn ku pa…ônu Ē~ ° nu kakur~…ĺut, banaw…ôn saatir~…ĺad…ôn mu ¶ik ¶ik, amana pikabadas, kas…ônuńßan tut aju mut…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺ s…ôpat bataan a sasur~…ĺitan maminsa, pa ¶umud…ô tu imsi satan…ôŇčańß, pakur~…ĺkur~…ĺ…ôn a ¶a tu r~…ĺima a sasur~…ĺitan, tuwa pa ¶ikańß ńßan kapańß tu. : .kabi nu taŇčkuj *,***"zajr~…ĺiw"; taŇčkuj, taju nidusdusan, tuŇčkuj ¶a ¶aj, ¶ikańß, adańßaj, : ńßi ¶an sapisar~…ĺami Ē~ ° amana r~…ĺipa…ônui ku taŇčkuj, duńß…ôpi ¶…ôn mu ¶ik ¶ik, taju nidusdusan, par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad…ôn ku nanum mut…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺ tur~…ĺu bataab a sasur~…ĺitan u tuŇčkuj "tusa a pajsu Ē~ °" t…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺ…ôn a ¶a tu r~…ĺima a sasur~…ĺitan pa ¶ikańß paar~…ĺ…ôdańß tu adidi Ē~ °. : . ina tusaaj a kabi Ē~ °, miadińß tu nikaidaw nu puu Ē~ °, asuakan…ôn, ńßinaar~…ĺa madajum musar~…ĺami, ¶ajkat…ôk…ôs u ¶aj kaw mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj a r~…ĺ Ē~ °mi Ē~ °, nika idaw ku kapańß amana ka sidumasa ukapańßaj a r~…ĺami Ē~ °.
